what: Full-protocol remeasurement of the shipped grc-joint-v3 checkpoint after correcting the package dependency decoder from the advertised-but-inexact decoder-v1 repair to the exact single-root maximum-spanning-arborescence objective.

scope.authorized: UD Ancient Greek Perseus and PROIEL test folds under the published sequential neural protocol
scope.not_run: The NT row has no dependency output and cannot be affected by an MST decoder change.

protocols.perseus: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); greek.evaluate_on_ud('perseus','test'); CPU sequential; gold tokenization; CoNLL-2018 evaluator
protocols.proiel_ud: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); greek.evaluate_on_ud('proiel','test'); CPU sequential; gold tokenization; out of domain
protocols.bootstrap: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); greek.bootstrap_ud('perseus','test', n_resamples=999, seed=0); CPU sequential

same_code_decoder_v1_control.decoder_source: decode_mst from public commit 9305e16cbd65f6b4ad417e5d4aea07b9a5b44e2f, injected in memory without changing the measured source tree

attribution.interpretation: The exact decoder correction changes one Perseus dependency arc and no PROIEL scored output relative to a same-code decoder-v1 control. The other one-token differences from the July 9 evidence are decoder-invariant and therefore reflect intervening runtime/evaluation-path changes. Current claims use the complete current recorded protocol, not a favorable subset of the A/B results.

proiel_convention_diagnostic.protocol: greek.proiel_convention_report(); CPU batch_size=32; diagnostic decomposition, not the sequential headline protocol

difference_from_sequential_headline.interpretation: The detailed batch-size-32 convention buckets are unchanged from the July 11 record, but the diagnostic is not an exact reproduction of the current sequential UAS row.

claims_decision: Use the decoder-v2 measurements as the current shipped-model evidence. Preserve the five-seed decoder-v1 record as historical training evidence, but do not present its parsing mean and spread as decoder-v2 replication.
